name: Ollama (Local LLM Runtime)
description: Run open-source large language models (Llama 3, Mistral, Phi, Gemma, and more) entirely on your machine. Exposes an OpenAI-compatible HTTP API — perfect for wiring local AI into Floci workflows, Lambdas, and agents at zero cost.

aws.parity: Develop against an OpenAI-compatible chat/embeddings API locally, then call Bedrock's managed models with the same request shape.
aws.deploy: Swap the base URL/SDK for the Bedrock Runtime API (or host the model on SageMaker) — your prompt code stays the same.

variables.label: API Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to expose the Ollama HTTP API.

variables.label: Model Keep-Alive
variables.description: How long a model stays loaded in memory after the last request (e.g. 5m, 1h, -1 for forever).
